title: Besos de Fuego
style: Reggaeton, Latin Urban, High Energy, Catchy Hook, Heavy Beats, Male Vocal, Club Mix, 100 BPM
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Beat drops)
¡Besos de Fuego!
¡Siente el ritmo!

[Verse 1]
La pista arde, vamos a bailar
La música suena y me hace vibrar
Rompiendo barreras, cruzando el umbral
Este sentimiento es un loco carrusel

[Pre-Chorus]
Sigue los latidos de tu corazón
Siente la energía subir por tus pies

[Chorus]
Rompiendo el hielo, alzando el vuelo
Cargando sin miedo nuestra propia cruz
Viviendo la magia de esta canción
Múevelo suave, múevelo ya

[Verse 2]
Donde nuestros sueños se pueden juntar
Sabiendo que mi única guía eres tú
Corriendo descalzos por todo el andén
Para este deseo no hay explicación

[Bridge]
(Sube la intensidad)
¡Baila!
¡Grita!
¡Goza!

[Chorus]
Rompiendo el hielo, alzando el vuelo
Cargando sin miedo nuestra propia cruz
Viviendo la magia de esta canción
Múevelo suave, múevelo ya

[Outro]
Besos de Fuego...
¡Fin!
[End]

title: Hustling My Buttons
style: Brazilian Funk, Baile Funk, heavy sub bass, energetic male MC vocal, rhythmic syncopated beat, upbeat party vibe, 130 BPM
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Heavy Brazilian funk beat)
(Electronic stabs)
¡Vai!

[Verse 1]
I'm telling you a hustling my buttons baby
I have a choice to keep running the same what you gonna do to me
But I ain't seen nothing I'm turning up
Sinto o fogo batendo no meu interior
Neste momento eu quero cantar
O calor aumenta, não posso parar
Deixando o passado longe de mim
Sinta a energia subir pelos pés
Essa sensação é fenomenal

[Chorus]
Fogo na alma, fogo na pele
Ritmo selvagem, pura paixão
Noite de festa, noite de luz
Neste planeta somos o elogio
Hustling my buttons, feeling so free
You're the only one for me

[Verse 2]
Não tem tempo de espera, a vida é assim
A música toca e me faz vibrar
Quebrando barreiras, cruzando o limiar
Andando pela rua sem olhar para trás
Every step I take is a magic spark
Burning like a candle in the velvet dark
Life is a circle, life is a song
This is the place where we all belong

[Bridge]
(Percussion breakdown)
(Whistle blast)
¡Buttons!
¡Vai!
¡Sente o grave!

[Chorus]
Fogo na alma, fogo na pele
Ritmo selvagem, pura paixão
Noite de festa, noite de luz
Neste planeta somos o elogio

[Outro]
Hustling my buttons...
Noite na favela...
¡Fin!
[End]

title: Wanna Be Bad
style: Electronic Pop, Dance, High Energy, Catchy Synth, Fast Tempo, Club Mix, 128 BPM, Energetic Vocal
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Fast rhythmic bass pulse)
(Electronic effects)
If you wanna be bad just...

[Verse 1]
I see you in the club, you getting down baby
I wanna get with you, yeah
I see you in the club, you showing love
I wanna get with you
You're so beautiful, so damn beautiful
Said you're so beautiful, so damn beautiful
Buscando el destino en la oscuridad
Tus ojos reflejan la luz de neón
Este sentimiento es un loco carrusel

[Chorus]
Este momento es un sueño real
Que en este planeta estamos los dos
Cargando sin miedo nuestra propia cruz
Probando el sabor dulce de tu miel
If you wanna be bad, let's go all night
Everything is feeling perfectly alright

[Verse 2]
La noche nos llama, la luna también
Siento el fuego latiendo en mi interior
Mirando al futuro con gran ilusión
Las luces se encienden, la magia se ve
Esta sensación es fenomenal
Buscando el amor y los buenos placeres
Every heart beat is a rhythmic sound
Feet are barely touching the cold, hard ground

[Bridge]
(High energy synth drop)
(Vocoder ad-libs)
¡Bad!
¡Beautiful!
¡Gózalo!

[Chorus]
Este momento es un sueño real
Que en este planeta estamos los dos
Cargando sin miedo nuestra propia cruz
Probando el sabor dulce de tu miel

[Outro]
Wanna be bad...
So damn beautiful...
¡Fin!
[End]

title: Mápalo
style: Baile Funk, Funk Carioca, Brazilian Funk, heavy sub bass, energetic male MC vocal, rhythmic syncopated beat, explicit, upbeat party vibe, club dance, 130 BPM
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Heavy Brazilian funk beat)
(Voice effects)
¡Mápalo!

[Verse 1]
Choca choca corpo com corpo, boca com boca
Choca choca corpo com corpo, boca com boca
Tô biquíni minha mápalo te dá uma volta
Cai na toca, cai na toca, toca da boca
Sinto o fogo batendo no meu interior
Buscando o destino que a vida nos traz
Deixando o passado longe de mim
Deixando mandar a pura paixão
Aumenta o som, faz vibrar o cristal

[Chorus]
Fogo na alma, fogo na pele
Provando o sabor doce do seu mel
Vivendo a magia desta canção
Não pare, siga até o fim
Mápalo, mápalo, no ritmo do mal
Baile de favela, som surreal

[Verse 2]
As luzes se acendem, a magia se vê
É o ritmo que me enche de amor
Não tem tempo de espera, a vida é assim
A pista ferve, vamos dançar
Seguindo a letra desta canção
É a pressão, mina linda e perigosa
Rouba meu coração, vai quicando, vai jogando
No batidão, no batidão, só para o tentação

[Bridge]
(Whistle blast)
(Bass breakdown)
¡Mápalo!
¡Vai!
¡Sente o grave!

[Chorus]
Fogo na alma, fogo na pele
Provando o sabor doce do seu mel
Vivendo a magia desta canção
Não pare, siga até o fim

[Outro]
Mápalo...
Choca choca...
¡Fin!
[End]

title: Baby Tú Tienes Algo
style: Reggaeton, Latin Pop, Romantic Vibe, Smooth Male Vocal, 95 BPM, Catchy Hook, Urban, Soft Synth
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Electronic synth arpeggio)

Déjame conocerte a fondo más íntimamente
Tu mirada me atrapa, me quita la reason
Escribiendo tu nombre en mi corazón

[Chorus]

[Verse 2]

Llenando mi vida de puro color
Girando mil veces, perdiendo el control
Bajo el encanto de este arrebol
No tengas miedo, déjate llevar
Que en este ritmo nos vamos a ahogar

[Bridge]
(Synthesizer solo)
(Dembow beat drops)
¡Diferente!
¡Siente el ritmo!
¡Múevelo!

[Chorus]
Baila conmigo, no mires atrás
En este camino tú eres mi paz
Muévelo suave, gózalo ya
Que esta aventura no tiene final
Baby tú tienes algo que me hace vibrar
En tus labios dulces me quiero quedar

[Outro]
Algo diferente...
Baby tú tienes algo...
Fin!
[End]

¡Fin!

¡Fin!

[Outro]

Não tem tempo de espera, a vida é assim

Seguindo a letra desta canção

Neste momento eu quero cantar
Aumenta o som, faz vibrar o cristal

(Bass breakdown)

¡Vai!

[Chorus]
Fogo na alma, fogo na pele

title: Friday Night Heat
style: Modern Hip Hop, Urban, Catchy Hook, Heavy 808 Bass, Energetic Female Vocal, Club Mix, 110 BPM, High Energy, Summer Vibe
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Heavy beat drop)
(Rhythmic clapping)
Yeah! Check the vibe!
Antigravity on the track!

[Verse 1]
It's 7 PM Friday, it's 95 degrees
Feeling the heat, moving with ease
The city is alive, the lights are so bright
We’re taking control of the rhythm tonight
No stopping now, we’re on the rise
I see the fire reflecting in your eyes
Walking down the boulevard, feeling so grand
Got the whole world right in our hand
Everything's perfect, everything's right
We're gonna own this beautiful night

[Chorus]
Friday night heat, feeling the glow
Everywhere we go, we’re putting on a show
Bass so loud, it’s shaking the ground
The best energy that can ever be found
High energy, high life, no compromise
Underneath the summer Friday skies
Let the rhythm take you, let it set you free
This is the only place we need to be

[Verse 2]
Starlight dancing on the concrete floor
Every beat is making us want more
The speakers are humming a sweet melody
Capturing moments for the world to see
From the east to the west, we're spreading the word
The loudest song that you've ever heard
Turn it up higher, don't let it fade
This is the legacy that we have made

[Bridge]
(Synthesizer solo)
(Beat intensifies)
Feel it in your soul, feel it in your bones
We're in the zone, we're on our thrones
Rising up, never coming down
The kings and queens of this golden town

[Chorus]
Friday night heat, feeling the glow
Everywhere we go, we’re putting on a show
Bass so loud, it’s shaking the ground
The best energy that can ever be found
High energy, high life, no compromise
Underneath the summer Friday skies

[Outro]
95 degrees...
Keep it hot...
Forever young, forever bold
This is the story that will be told
[End]

title: Foto Conmigo
style: Reggaeton, Urban Latino, Smooth Male Vocals, Mid-tempo, Catchy Hook, Heavy Bass, 95 BPM, Romantic Vibe, Club Mix
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Melodic synth swells)
(Dembow beat starts slowly)
Oye mami...
Tú sabes que esto es otra cosa
Directo desde el corazón

[Verse 1]
Sube una foto conmigo
Que sepan que tienes dueño
Eres un lío, pero mami yo te entiendo
Porque estás tan rica que a veces hasta te sueño
Me sales en el humo cuando un phillie prendo
Caminando por la playa, bajo el sol brillante
Tu mirada me atrapa, eres tan radiante
No hay nadie en el mundo que se te compare
Este sentimiento no hay quien lo separe

[Chorus]
Esa mirada que me mata lento
En cada paso, un sentimiento
No importa el mundo, solo este momento
Bailando suave, quitando el aliento
Eres mi musa, mi mejor invento
Sube la foto, dale movimiento
Que todo el mundo vea nuestro cuento

[Verse 2]
Te vi desde lejos y supe que eras tú
Brillando más fuerte que cualquier luz
Tus labios de fresa, tu piel de canela
En este baile tú eres mi estrella
Dámelo todo, no te guardes nada
Que esta pasión está muy disparada
Girando mil veces, perdiendo el sentido
Estando contigo me siento bendecido

[Bridge]
(Bass breakdown)
(Mambo rhythm)
Pégate un poco, siente el calor
En este ritmo no hay nada mejor
Múevelo lento, múevelo así
Toda la noche te quiero para mí

[Chorus]
Esa mirada que me mata lento
En cada paso, un sentimiento
No importa el mundo, solo este momento
Bailando suave, quitando el aliento
Eres mi musa, mi mejor invento
Sube la foto, dale movimiento

[Outro]
Solo una foto...
Mami te sueño...
Tú y yo por siempre
Sin mirar atrás
[End]

title: Vuelo Viral
style: Trap Latino, High Energy, Catchy Hook, Melodic Flow, Luxury Vibe, Jet Set, 105 BPM, Heavy 808 Bass, Club Mix
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Sound of jet engine fading into beat)
(Heavy bass drop)
Normal...
Tú ya sabes cómo lo hacemos
Nivel superior

[Verse 1]
Viajamos en jet privado, normal
Subí una foto para irnos viral
Diablo mami, ¿qué haces tú?, tienes el cuerpo perfecto
Y qué rico hueles, sabes que estás buena
Y fronteas porque puedes, nadie te frena
Diamantes en el cuello, brillando en la escena
Desde Miami hasta Cartagena
Vivimos la vida, rompemos la cadena

[Chorus]
Nivel superior, sin mirar atrás
Lo que tenemos, nadie lo tiene más
Brillando fuerte, pura intensidad
En las alturas, buscando libertad
La envidia mira, pero no nos alcanzará
Nuestra leyenda siempre vivirá
En cada vuelo, la magia crecerá

[Verse 2]
Botellas de champaña, lujos por doquier
Todo lo que quiero lo puedo tener
Pero lo más valioso es tenerte a mi lado
En este camino que hemos trazado
Tus ojos reflejan el oro y el mar
Contigo yo siempre quiero viajar
Sin fronteras, sin límites, solo tú y yo
En este imperio que el destino nos dio

[Bridge]

(Aggressive flow)
Siente el poder, siente la presión
Somos los dueños de esta canción
Subiendo de rango, llegando a la cima
Cambiando por completo todo el clima

[Chorus]
Nivel superior, sin mirar atrás
Lo que tenemos, nadie lo tiene más
Brillando fuerte, pura intensidad
En las alturas, buscando libertad
La envidia mira, pero no nos alcanzará

Jet privado...
Viral...
Tú sabes que somos los jefes
Controlando el aire y el mar

title: Esa Nena Wow
style: Reggaeton, Catchy Hook, Aggressive Flow, Party Anthem, Club Banger, Street Style, 100 BPM, Heavy Drums
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Dembow rhythm kicks in hard)
(Voices shouting in the background)

[Verse 1]
Ponte a trabajar, busca tu destino

Porque este respeto no se puede comprar
Sí, esa nena wow, muerde el borice gatito

Y esa nena con ese piquete, ella se cotiza
No cualquiera se lo mete, ella te esclaviza

[Chorus]

Con su piquete nos pone a sudar
No le importa nada, solo quiere bailar
En la pista de baile, la va a reventar
Mira como se mueve, no para de brillar
Esa nena wow, nos va a hipnotizar
Con su ritmo salvaje, nos va a conquistar

[Verse 2]
Ella entra al club y se apaga la luz
Cargando su estilo como si fuera una cruz
Toda la gente se queda mirando
Mientras ella sigue, despacio bajando
Sus ojos de fuego, su piel de neón
Es la reina absoluta de esta canción
No busques pelea, no busques acción
Solo ríndete ante su gran seducción

(Percussion solo)
Múevelo mami, no te detengas
Que todo el veneno tú lo mantengas
De izquierda a derecha, perdiendo el compás

Esa nena tiene el control del lugar
Con su piquete nos pone a sudar
No le importa nada, solo quiere bailar
En la pista de baile, la va a reventar
Mira como se mueve, no para de brillar

Se cotiza...
Wow...
La nena que manda
La que siempre gana

title: Corte de Flaitte
style: Latin Urban, Melodic Flow, Romantic Street Vibe, Luxury, Diamond Chain, 92 BPM, Catchy Hook, Smooth Male Vocal, Urban Passion
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Smooth melodic guitar)

(Guitar solo)

title: Traiciones de San Pedro

[Bridge]
(Accordion and Horn solo)

La cuenta pendiente se va a liquidar
En el libro de la vida, no hay donde escapar
El que traiciona, tarde o temprano va a llorar

title: Camas Vacías

title: Diamante en Bruto
style: Gritty Trap, 140 BPM, Distorted 808, Sharp Percussion, Intense, Street, Spanish Rap
lyrics:
[Intro]

Cruzando la noche, cruzando el sendero.

(Snare rolls intensifying)

[End]

title: Corazón de Hierro
style: Latin Rock/Urban, Gritty Vocals, Electric Guitar, Strong Vibe, 112 BPM, Aggressive, Anthem, Catchy Hook
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Distorted electric guitar riff)
(Drum roll)
¡Hierro!
¡Nada nos detiene!
¡Siente la fuerza!

[Verse 1]
Forjado en el fuego, templado en el mar
Un corazón de hierro que no va a fallar
Siguiendo el instinto, volviendo a empezar
En esta batalla, voy a triunfar
No existe el olvido, solo el recordar
Que en este mundo, vine a ganar
Paredes de roca, vientos de cristal
Mi espíritu libre, algo primordial
No busco la fama, no busco el perdón
Solo la gloria de mi propia acción

[Chorus]
Corazón de hierro, alma de metal
Buscando el destino, lo más natural
Sin miedo al tiempo, sin miedo al final
En esta historia, soy el principal
Fuerte y constante, algo incondicional
Rompiendo cadenas, algo fenomenal
Nuestra bandera es la libertad total

[Verse 2]
Caminando solo a través del dolor
Encontrando siempre un nuevo valor
Las sombras se alejan, el miedo se va
Cuando mi grito la tierra abrirá
No me rendiré, no voy a caer
Tengo la fuerza para vencer
Cualquier obstáculo, cualquier traición
Poniendo el alma en cada oración

[Bridge]
(Electric guitar solo)
(Power chords)
¡Hierro!
¡Fuerte!
¡Venceremos!
¡Siente el poder!

[Chorus]
Corazón de hierro, alma de metal
Buscando el destino, lo más natural
Sin miedo al tiempo, sin miedo al final
En esta historia, soy el principal
Fuerte y constante, algo incondicional

[Outro]
Triunfar...
Hierro...
Corazón de acero
Hasta el final
[End]

title: Kinetic Circuit
style: Tech House, 128 BPM, Heavy Kick, Sub-bass, Glitchy Synths, Club Energy, High Definition
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Heavy kick pulsing)
(Electric static building up)
Yo, feel the pulse in the wire.
The energy's rising higher.

[Verse 1]
Midnight shadows dancing on the wall,
Digital echoes through the neon hall.
The rhythm is a weapon, locked and loaded,
Every single circuit has been decoded.
Bassline dropping like a hammer of light,
Breaking through the silence of the city night.
We don't stop until the sun begins to rise,
Electrified vision in our digital eyes.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Synthesizers intensify)
Can you feel it?
(Pulse! Pulse!)
Are you with it?
(Now! Now!)

[Chorus]
Kinetic energy, pumping through my veins,
Breaking the silence, breaking all the chains.
Techno heartbeat, steady and strong,
This is where we all belong.
Pulse! (Electric glitch)
Pulse! (Bass drop)
We are the rhythm, we are the light,
Burning bright in the middle of the night.

[Bridge]
(Minimal beat, heavy reverb)
Systems online.
Voltage stable.
Override the labels.
(Beat builds up rapidly)
GO!

[Drop]
(Aggressive synth lead, heavy bass stabs)
(Glitchy percussion fills)

[Outro]
(Kick fades out slowly)
(Electronic hum remaining)
Circuit closed.
Power down.
[End]

title: Groove Avenue
style: Funky House, 115 BPM, Slap Bass, Brass Stabs, Electric Guitar, Urban Groove, Funky, Uplifting
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Funky slap bass riff)
(Brass section hit!)
Yeah! Step into the light.
We’re gonna make it right.

[Verse 1]
Walking down the street with a rhythm in my shoes,
Got no time for trouble, got no time for blues.
The city’s humming with a funky kind of sound,
Everybody’s moving, feet off the ground.
Golden brass is shouting from the corner bar,
Doesn’t matter who you are, you’re a superstar.
Let the bassline take you where you need to be,
In this funky forest, we are finally free.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Guitar scratching)
One step, two step, feel the heat.
Every heart is tapping to the funky beat.

[Chorus]
Groove Avenue, where the sun never sets,
No more worries and no more regrets.
With a slap and a pop, we’re keeping it live,
This is the magic, the way we survive.
(Brass solo section)
Horn section rising high!
Touch the clouds in the funky sky!

[Bridge]
(Drum break, solo bass)
Keep it loose.
Keep it tight.
Groove all night.
(Full band joins in)
Hit it!

[Outro]
(Bassline fades into a final brass hit)
(Laughter in the background)
Stay funky.
[End]

title: Tropical Serenity
style: Tropical House, 100 BPM, Marimba, Acoustic Guitar, Chill, Summer Vibe, Relaxing, Airy Vocals
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Soft ocean waves sound)
(Gentle marimba melody)
Mmm, yeah. Summer’s here.

[Verse 1]
Golden sand between my toes, where the water flows,
Every secret of the ocean, everybody knows.
Acoustic strings are whispering in the salty air,
Sunlight dancing in the curls of your messy hair.
Take a sip of coconut, let the world just spin,
This is where the magic of the day begins.
No more clocks to follow, no more plans to make,
Just the ripple of the tide for goodness sake.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Light percussion joins in)
Slow it down, breathe it in.
Let the summer rhythm win.

[Chorus]
Island breeze, carry us away,
To the softest part of a perfect day.
Marimba echoes in the coral blue,
Nothing in the world but me and you.
(Acoustic guitar solo)
(Warm pads building)
Tropical heart, tropical soul.
Letting the ocean take control.

[Bridge]
(Drum beat stops, only ambient pads and guitar)
Under the palm trees, in the shade,
Best memories we’ve ever made.
(Soft snap track starts)
One more time...

[Outro]
(Marimba melody repeating and fading)
(Ocean waves return)
Sunset gold.
Island soul.
[End]

title: Velvet Midnight
style: Sultry R&B, 95 BPM, Rhodes Piano, Smooth Bassline, Soulful, Sophisticated, Midnight Vibe
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Smooth Rhodes piano chords)
(Soft snaps)
(Bass enters gently)
It’s after hours...
Just you and me.

[Verse 1]
Shadows painting patterns on the velvet floor,
Never felt a rhythm quite like this before.
The candle’s burning low, a flicker in the dark,
Every word you whisper is a tiny spark.
Smooth as silk, the bassline starts to climb,
We’re suspended here, outside of space and time.
Rhodes is singing softly, sweet and deep,
A secret that the midnight is trying to keep.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Drums get deeper, more resonance)
Don’t say a word, just let it flow.
Nowhere else we need to go.

[Chorus]
Velvet midnight, wrapping us around,
Lost in the beauty of a soul-deep sound.
Sweet and slow, the way the music moves,
Finding our truth in these mellow grooves.
(Smooth saxophone-style synth solo)
(Sophisticated harmonies)
Oh, it’s velvet.
So smooth.

[Bridge]
(Bass solo, very melodic)
Take it down.
Feel the warmth.
Every beat, a promise kept.
(Drums return with a subtle swing)

[Outro]
(Rhodes piano slowly fades with a single bass note)
Midnight velvet.
Stay here forever.
[End]

title: Echoes of Silence
style: Cinematic Dark Pop, 140 BPM, Atmospheric Pads, Deep Strings, Industrial Percussion, Ethereal, Haunting
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Dark, ambient pad texture)
(Distant industrial clangs)
(Slightly distorted vocal hum)
Can you hear the ghosts?

[Verse 1]
Concrete canyons screaming in the hollow wind,
Searching for a place where the light begins.
Deep strings are pulling at the edges of the night,
Hiding all the colors from the morning light.
Cold iron rhythm, heavy and slow,
Echoes of the secrets that we used to know.
Atmosphere is heavy, like a leaden sky,
Watching all the moments passing by.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Industrial percussion intensifies)
(Whispering voices in the stereo field)
Stay awake.
Don’t break.

[Chorus]
Echoes of silence, calling out my name,
Everything is different, nothing is the same.
Darkened shadows, pulling us down,
In the quiet ruins of this ghost town.
(Deep, distorted bass synth solo)
(Haunting melody high above)
Silence is loud.
Silence is heavy.

[Bridge]
(Sudden silence, then a lone string melody)
If we reach out...
Will there be anyone there?
(Massive drum hit, building to a wall of sound)
BREAK IT!

[Outro]
(Wall of sound collapses into static)
(One final, distant industrial hit)
Only the echo remains.
[End]

title: Solo Un Beso
style: Latin Pop, 95 BPM, Acoustic Guitar, Reggaeton-lite, Romantic, Warm, Spanish Vibe
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Gentle acoustic guitar strumming)
(Soft shaker enters)
Oye, solo un momento.
Escucha mi corazón.

[Verse 1]
Bajo la luna, el aire es tan frío,
Pero tu fuego es lo único mío.
Caminando despacio, sin prisa ninguna,
Buscando el reflejo de amor en la luna.
La guitarra suspira, contando verdades,
Perdidos en medio de mil ciudades.
Tu risa es la música que quiero escuchar,
Como el suave sonido de las olas del mar.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Rhythm intensifies slightly)
Dame tu mano, no tengas miedo.
Es todo lo que pido, es todo lo que quiero.

[Chorus]
Solo un beso, para detener el tiempo,
Para sentir la paz en este momento.
Tu piel de seda, tu aroma de flor,
Eres el puerto de todo mi amor.
(Melodic guitar solo)
(Warm pads building)
Solo un beso, nada más...
En esta noche de paz.

[Bridge]
(Minimal beat, focus on guitar and vocals)
Si el mundo se acaba mañana,
Que me encuentre en tu ventana.
(Full rhythm returns)
¡Dale!

[Outro]
(Acoustic guitar fades out)
Solo un beso.
Para siempre.
[End]

title: Calle Caliente
style: Urban Reggaeton, 90 BPM, Dembow, Synth Bass, Gritty, Street Vibe, Commanding Vocals
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Heavy dembow kick starts immediately)
(Distant sirens and street noise)
Atención. La calle está hablando.
¿Estás listo? ¡Vámonos!

[Verse 1]
El asfalto quema, el ritmo no para,
Mirando el destino cara a cara.
Bajos retumban en cada esquina,
La energía sube, pura adrenalina.
No hay fronteras en esta ciudad,
Buscando el respeto, la libertad.
El eco del barrio, la voz del tambor,
Somos el fuego, somos el calor.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Bass drops lower)
Siente la fuerza, siente el poder.
No hay nada en el mundo que nos pueda detener.

[Chorus]
Calle caliente, fuego en la piel,
El ritmo es veneno, el ritmo là hiel.
Bailando en el borde, sin mirar atrás,
Dámelo todo, no pidas más.
(Aggressive synth stab section)
(Percussion breakdown)
¡Fuego! ¡Fuego! en la avenida.
Esta es la vida, esta es mi vida.

[Bridge]
(Beat slows down, gritty bass hum)
Desde el suelo hasta el cielo.
Sin miedo.
(Beat explodes back)
¡Rompe!

[Outro]
(Dembow beat cuts off sharply)
(Echoing street sounds)
Calle caliente.
Control total.
[End]

title: Sussurro do Mar
style: Nu-Disco, 116 BPM, Retro, Funk, Synth Arpeggio, Daft Punk style, Groovy, Funky
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Vintage drum machine start)
(Funky wah-wah guitar riff)
(Bright synth arpeggio building up)

[Verse 1]
Mirrors are spinning, casting a spell,

Flash of the neon, purple and gold,
A story of rhythm that’s never been told.
Bassline is walking, smooth and so tight,
Catching the fire of the city light.
Electronic dreams in a digital sky,
We’re floating on air, learning to fly.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Synthesizer filter sweep)
Don’t stop the movement, don’t stop the flow.
Everything’s glowing in the disco glow.

[Chorus]
Neon Disco Night, feel the vibration,
A funky groove for the whole generation.
Dance in the strobe light, lose all control,
Let the disco rhythm heal your soul.
(Groovy bass solo)
(Vocoder harmonies: "Neon Night... Neon Night...")
High on the rhythm, high on the sound.

[Bridge]
(Beat breaks down, clap track only)
Left, right. Keep it tight.
Up, down. Own the town.
(Full groove returns with horns)
One more time!

[Outro]
(Synth arps fading out)
(Guitar scratch remaining)

See you in the neon.

title: Noite Carioca
style: Emotional Reggaeton, 92 BPM, Nylon Guitar, Soft Drums, Melodic, Passionate, Spanish Rap
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Sad nylon guitar melody)
(Rain sounds in the background)
(Soft vocal sigh)

[Verse 1]
Un laberinto de dudas en mi cabeza,
Perdido en las sombras de la tristeza.
Dibujo tu rostro en el aire vacío,
Buscando el calor en medio del frío.
Tu voz es un eco que no me deja dormir,
Un puente roto que no puedo cruzar para ir.
Cada palabra que no nos dijimos,
Es un peso enorme que hoy compartimos.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Subtle beat starts, very deep)
No sé si es odio, no sé si là amor.
Solo sé que el alma tiene este dolor.

[Chorus]
Desorden mental, un caos interno,
Viviendo atrapado en este invierno.
Te busco en mis sueños, te pierdo al despertar,
En este océano, no sé naufragar.
(Emotional guitar solo)
(Pads building up tension)
Desorden mental... nada là real.
Un final amargo, un golpe fatal.

[Bridge]
(Beat stops, only guitar and rain)
Si pudiera volver el tiempo atrás...
Cambiaría el final, pero ya không thể nào.
(Beat kicks back in for final crescendo)

[Outro]
(Guitar melody fades away)
(Rain sounds remain)
Cerrando los ojos.
En el desorden.
[End]

title: Ritmo da Favela
style: Afrobeat, 105 BPM, Percussion-driven, Saxophone, Groovy, Sunny, Smooth Flow, African Vibe
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Complex percussion layer: Shaker, Congas, Woodblock)
(Mellow electric piano chords)
(Saxophone lick: "Du-du-du-da!")
Africa is calling. Shine on!

[Verse 1]
Morning light breaking through the dusty trees,
Feel the rhythm carried on the summer breeze.
Market is busy, colors so bright,
Everything’s moving in the golden light.
The ground is shaking under our feet,
Merging our souls with the afro beat.
Life is a circle, life is a song,
This is the place where we all belong.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Bassline becomes more syncopated)
Shake it off, let the spirit rise.
See the fire in our brothers’ eyes.

[Chorus]
Afro Sunshine, burning so deep,
A promise of joy that we’re gonna keep.
Saxophone singing, drums never stop,
Taking the energy all the way to the top.
(Saxophone solo with heavy groove)
(Group chants: "O-ye! O-ye!")
Celebrate the life, celebrate the sound.

[Bridge]
(Drum solo breakdown)
(Rhythmic clapping)
Feel the earth.
Feel the fire.
Taking it higher.

[Outro]
(Percussion fades out gradually)
(Final saxophone note)
Shine on.
Afro heart.
[End]

title: Diamond Street
style: Trap, 140 BPM, Heavy 808 Bass, Snare Rolls, Aggressive, Street, Female Rap
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Heavy 808 distortion)
(Sharp snare rolls)
Yeah. Check the ice. 
You know who it is. 

[Verse 1]
Rolling through the city in a blacked-out whip,
Never lose the rhythm, never lose the grip.
Diamonds on my neck, shining like the sun,
Started from the bottom, now we’re number one.
808 is knocking, shaking up the ground,
Everywhere I go, people know the sound.
I don’t play the game, I just make the rules,
Leaving all the haters looking like some fools.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Hi-hats accelerating)
Can you see the shine?
Everything is mine.

[Chorus]
Diamond Street, where the winners play,
Turn the midnight into bright-ass day.
With a heavy bass and a heart of steel,
Keep it 100, keep it real.
(Trap beat drop)
(Fast hi-hat triplets)
Shine! Shine!
We’re taking over the line.

[Bridge]
(Beat cuts to half-time, deep bass hum)
No stopping.
No dropping.
Only popping.
(Beat explodes back with synth bells)

[Outro]
(808 fades out slowly)
(Distant police siren)
Diamond Street.
Forever. 
[End]

title: Baile Vibrations
style: Baile Funk, 130 BPM, Funk Carioca, Heavy Bass, Percussive, Energetic, Brazilian Vibe
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Heavy Brazilian funk beat)
(Whistle sound: "Fiu-fiu!")
(Vocal shout: "Atenção!")
Vai! Vai! Vai!

[Verse 1]
Sente o balanço, sente o calor,
O baile tá cheio, cadê o meu amor?
Ritmo de favela, batida no peito,
Todo mundo dança do seu jeito.
O grave tá forte, estremecendo o chão,
Energia pura, muita emoção.
Não para o movimento, não para o som,
O DJ no comando, o clima tá bom.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Synthesizer stabs)
Mão pro alto, deixa girar.
O funk não deixa ninguém parado no lugar.

[Chorus]
Baile vibrations, vamo lá,
Até o sol aparecer pra nos saudar.
Com o corpo suado, o coração a mil,
O melhor balanço de todo o Brasil.
(Percussion breakdown)
(Rhythmic chanting: "Vem! Vem! Vem!")

[Bridge]
(Beat drops out, only whistles and handclaps)
Um, dois. Passinho na mão.
Três, quatro. Explosão!
(Full beat returns with heavy bass)

[Outro]
(Beat fades with a final whistle)
(Crowd cheering)
Baile vibrante.
Até a próxima.
[End]

title: Sunset Disco
style: Retro Disco, 118 BPM, Electric Guitar, Horns, Funky Bass, Happy, Joyful, Soulful
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Bright electric guitar riff)
(Horns fanfare!)
(Groovy bassline enters)
Put your hands up! 
It’s time to celebrate!

[Verse 1]
Dancing in the neon, under the purple sky,
Watching all the worries simply passing by.
Golden guitar is scratching out a funky tune,
Underneath the shadows of the rising moon.
Every single step is like a magic spark,
Burning like a candle in the velvet dark.
Horn section rising, calling out to you,
Tell me, baby, tell me what you’re gonna do.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Synth filter sweep)
Feel the soul, feel the light.
Everything is gonna be alright tonight.

[Chorus]
Sunset Disco, dance the night away,
Forget about the trouble of the working day.
With a funky bass and a heart so free,
You’re the only person that I want to see.
(Saxophone solo with disco strings)
(Clap track building)
Dance! Dance!
This is our chance!

[Bridge]
(Drum break with cowbell)
Get down.
Spin around.
Own the ground.
(Full band joins for final chorus)

[Outro]
(Disco strings fading out)
(Guitar scratch remaining)
Keep dancing.
See you at the sunset.
[End]

title: Horizonte Suave
style: Reggaeton-lite, 90 BPM, Muted Guitar, Soft Dembow, Chill, Cool, Urban Vibe
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Muted electric guitar chords)
(Soft ocean breeze sound)
(Vocal hum: "Mmm-mmm")
Tranquilo, mami. 
Solo tú y yo.

[Verse 1]
Caminando suave por la orilla del mar,
Sin ninguna prisa, sin nada que buscar.
La brisa acaricia tu pelo de seda,
En este paraíso, nada se nos queda.
El ritmo dembow es un latido lento,
Disfrutando cada paso, cada momento.
La luna se asoma con curiosidad,
En medio de tanta tranquilidad.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Beat becomes more resonant)
No digas nada, solo déjate llevar.
En este horizonte, vamos a soñar.

[Chorus]
Mellow horizon, luz de cristal,
Un amor puro, algo natural.
Con el sol cayendo y el mar cantando,
Nuestros corazones se van encontrando.
(Soft synthesizer melody)
(Guitar solo with warm reverb)
Tranquilo... así...
Mejor para ti.

[Bridge]
(Beat stops, focus on muted guitar)
El mundo afuera puede esperar.
Aquí adentro, solo hay que amar.
(Beat returns gently)

[Outro]
(Guitar melody fades out slowly)
(Ocean breeze returns)
Mellow horizon.
Dulce final.
[End]

title: Romance Dulce
style: Reggaeton Pop, 92 BPM, Acoustic Guitar, Light Percussion, Romantic, Sweet, Melodic
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Melodic acoustic guitar picking)
(Soft synth pad layers)
Es para ti, mi vida. 
Escucha bien.

[Verse 1]
Cada mañana cuando sale el sol,
Eres el color de mi girasol.
Tu voz es la dulce melodía,
Que llena de luz toda mi alegría.
No necesito diamantes ni oro,
Porque tu sonrisa là mi tesoro.
El ritmo late al compás de tu aliento,
Llenando de magia cada sentimiento.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Light percussion enters)
Tan suave, tan real.
Un sentimiento universal.

[Chorus]
Soft romance, bajo la lluvia,
Bailando despacio con tu dulzura.
Un paso, un beso, una promesa,
Donde la tristeza nunca regresa.
(Acoustic guitar solo with sweet melody)
(Harmonies building up)
Eres tú, mi amor.
Mi único calor.

[Bridge]
(Minimal beat, focus on emotional vocals)
Si me faltas tú, me falta el aire.
No quiero perderme en este baile.
(Full melody returns for the final peak)

[Outro]
(Guitar picking repeating and fading)
Soft romance.
Por siempre tú.
[End]

title: Mami Sabrosa
style: Sexy Reggaeton, 95 BPM, Heavy Dembow, Synth Plucks, Club, Sultry, Spanish Urban
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Heavy dembow kick with a slight delay)
(Mysterious synth pluck melody)
Oye mami... sabes lo que quiero.
Es el momento. ¡Dale!

[Verse 1]
La luz de la luna brilla en tu piel,
Dulce como azúcar, pura como miel.
Bailando en la sombra, moviendo el compás,
Un ritmo caliente que no olvidarás.
Bajos retumban, el aire se quema,
Eres la reina de todo el sistema.
Mirada de fuego, paso de seda,
En este baile, nada se queda.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Snaps and light percussion)
Acércate un poco, siente el calor.
Perdidos en medio de tanto sabor.

[Chorus]
Mami sabrosa, fuego en el club,
Bailando al ritmo de mi dembow pub.
Con cada movimiento, me robas el alma,
En esta fiesta, perdemos la calma.
(Catchy synth lead solo)
(Percussion breakdown)
¡Sabor! ¡Sabor! que me hace vibrar.
Nunca, mami, te voy a soltar.

[Bridge]
(Beat drops to a minimal pulse, focus on breathy vocals)
Solo tú y yo.
En la oscuridad.
(Beat explodes back with full force)

[Outro]
(Dembow beat fades into the synth melody)
Mami sabrosa.
Control total.
[End]

title: Funk de Elite
style: Baile Funk, 130 BPM, Sharp Synth Leads, Whistles, Raw, Energetic, Brazilian Funk
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Hard-hitting funk carioca beat)
(Whistle blast: "PHWEEET!")
(Vocal shout: "É o funk de elite!")
Vai! Joga! Vai!

[Verse 1]
Batida pesada, som de favela,
Aumenta o volume, abre a janela.
O grave sacode, o corpo responde,
O ritmo te pega, não importa onde.
Sinatras e luzes, a pista fervendo,
Todo mundo vê o que tá acontecendo.
É funk raiz, é funk de verdade,
Levando a energia por toda a cidade.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Rapid clap track building)
Mão no joelho, balança o quadril.
É o melhor ritmo de todo o Brasil.

[Chorus]
Funk de elite, batida no talo,
Com esse balanço eu nunca me calo.
Whistle no beat, grave no peito,
Fazendo a galera dançar do seu jeito.
(Electronic synth stab section)
(Percussion explosion)
Vai, vai! No balanço do mal.
Funk de elite, som surreal.

[Bridge]
(Beat stops, only whistles and shouting echoes)
Um, dois. Preparar.
Três, quatro. Vamos quebrar!
(Beat returns with maximum distortion)

[Outro]
(Beat cuts off with a final whistle)
Funk de elite.
Respeita o grave.
[End]

title: Stadium Anthem
style: Rock-Pop, 125 BPM, Distorted Guitars, Punchy Drums, Anthem, Powerful, High Energy
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Heavy drum roll building tension)
(Screaming distorted electric guitar)
(Group shout: "HEY! HEY! HEY!")
Are you ready for the fight?

[Verse 1]

No defeat.

[Outro]

title: Nuits Parisiennes
style: French Pop, 110 BPM, Accordion-synth, Playful, Chic, Elegant, Flirty Female Vocals

Les lumières de la ville brillent dans tes yeux,

title: Ritmo del Barrio

lyrics:

Control total.

title: Estrella del Club

(Guitar melody fading slowly)

Quédate conmigo.
[End]

title: Vicky Kona
style: Urban Reggaeton, 105 BPM, Moombahton, Heavy Kick, Percussive Synths, Vocal Chops, Playful, Hype
lyrics:
[Intro]
(High-energy vocal chops: "Vicky! Vicky!")
(Heavy kick drum hits twice)
¿Estás lista? Kona Style.
¡Muévelo!

[Verse 1]
Llegó a la pista robando atención,
Un ritmo que quema, pura explosión.
Con sus movimientos, rompe la ley,
Ella es la reina, no necesita rey.
Sintetizadores que suenan a calle,
No hay un detalle que ella no halle.
Mirada de fuego, paso de metal,
Una aventura que no tiene final.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Moombahton rhythm switch)
Sube el volumen, deja que suene.
Nadie la para, nadie la detiene.

[Chorus]
Vicky Kona, reina del lugar,
Bailando fuerte, sin descansar.
Con ese tumbao que me hace vibrar,
En este juego, te voy a ganar.
(Aggressive synth lead solo)
(Vocal chant: "¡Vicky! ¡Kona!")

[Bridge]
(Drum breakdown, rhythmic claps)

Un poco más fuerte.
(Beat explodes back)

[Outro]

La jefa.
[End]

title: Brisa de Mar
style: Tropical Latin Pop, 92 BPM, Soft Reggaeton, Acoustic Guitar, Chill, Romantic, Breezy
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Bright, sun-drenched acoustic guitar chords)
(Sound of soft shakers)
(Sea breeze ambient sound)
Relax... siente el mar.

[Verse 1]
Caminando descalzos sobre la arena,
Olvidando el mundo, borrando la pena.
La brisa acaricia tu pelo al pasar,
En este refugio frente al inmenso mar.
Tu risa es la música que quiero guardar,
Un secreto eterno que el viento va a dar.
Nylon y madera, cuerdas que hablan fiel,
Contando historias de amor en la piel.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Soft reggaeton kick starts)
Deja que el sol nos cubra el camino.
Eres mi suerte, eres mi destino.

[Chorus]
Brisa de mar, llévame allá,
Donde el tiempo se detiene y la paz volverá.
Reggaeton suave, alma tropical,
Un paraíso eterno, algo natural.
(Sweet melodic guitar solo)
(Warm sub-bass layers)

Tropical love.

[Bridge]
(Minimal rhythm, focus on guitar)
Bajo las palmeras, viendo el atardecer,
Todo lo que quiero, es volverte a ver.
(Full groove returns gently)

[Outro]
(Guitar melody fading out into ocean waves)
Brisa de mar.
Para siempre.
[End]

title: Explicación de Amor
style: Reggaeton, 92 BPM, Latin Urban, Sultry, Romantic, Street Vibe, Heavy Dembow, Male Vocal
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Deep sub bass pulse)
(Soft shaker starts)
(Vocal whisper: "Déjame que te explique...")
Sí... oye.

[Verse 1]
Yo sé que tú no me has olvidado,
De ese calor tuyo, mami, no he renunciado.
Me pongo celoso cuando không estás a mi lado,
Es un loco peligroso por ti caigo arrestado.
Si me lleva la patrulla, que me lleve por amarte,
Porque en cada rincón yo no dejo de buscarte.
Tu piel es el mapa que quiero recorrer,
Desde la noche oscura hasta el amanecer.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Bass drops lower, more resonance)
Siente la fuerza, siente el deseo.
Eres la única reina en mi recreo.

[Chorus]
Una explicación de amor, sin palabras,
Donde el alma se abre y la puerta se labra.
Reggaeton lento, pasión prohibida,
Eres el aire que le da sentido a mi vida.
(Smooth dembow breakdown)
(Vocal ad-libs: "¡Dámelo!")
Amor de calle, amor real.

[Bridge]
(Beat drops to a minimal pulse)
Despacio, contra la pared.
Calmando la sed.
(Full beat returns with energy)
¡Vámonos!

[Outro]
(Echoing percussion fade)
Déjame explicarte.
Para siempre.
[End]

title: Neon Horizon
style: Electronic Dance, 120 BPM, Future Pop, Uplifting, Bright Synths, High Energy, Modern, Male Vocal
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Bright, shimmering synth arpeggio)
(Fast drum build-up)
(Vocal shout: "Here we go!")

[Verse 1]
Watching the city from the rooftop height,
Bathed in the glow of the electric light.
Every pulse of the rhythm is a brand new start,

We’re the children of the neon sky,
Learning to live, learning to fly.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Filter sweep on the lead synth)

[Chorus]

We are the energy, we are the light.
Future is calling, can you hear the sound?
Lifting our spirits off the ground.
(High-energy synth lead drop)
(Vibrant electronic percussion)
Shine on! Shine on!

[Bridge]
(Drum break, melodic pads)
In the silence of the code,
We found the road.
(Massive build-up returns)

[Outro]
(Synth arps fading out)
(Single electronic chime)
See you in the future.
Neon dreams.
[End]

title: Eco de Pasión
style: Latin Pop, 94 BPM, Urban Ballad, Emotional, Rhythmic, Soft Synths, Melodic, Male Vocal
lyrics:
[Intro]
(Soft melodic synth texture)
(Rhythmic snap track starts)
(Sigh)
¿Te acuerdas?

[Verse 1]
Hai tanto tiempo que no te miraba,
Y en mis sueños siempre te buscaba.
Un eco de besos que el viento llevó,
Una historia de amor mà không se terminó.
Tu risa es la música de mi soledad,
Buscando el camino a la libertad.
En cada palabra, en cada suspiro,
Eres el centro de todo mi giro.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Guitar-style synth melody)
No me pidas que te olvide.
Si mi alma todavía te pide.

[Chorus]
Eco de pasión, gritando tu nombre,

Ritmo urbano, corazón de seda,
Eres lo único que en mi vida queda.

(Warm sub-bass layers)

Pasión real.

[Bridge]

(Beat returns with full resonance)

Te espero.

title: Club Nocturno
style: Modern Reggaeton, 90 BPM, Club Vibe, Chill, Deep Bass, Smooth Rhythm, Catchy Hook, Male Vocal
lyrics:
[Intro]

(Sound of ice cubes in a glass)

[Verse 1]
Luces bajas, humo en el aire,

Tu mirada dice lo que no hablas,
Rompiendo el hielo, sobran las palabras.
El bajo retumba en la oscuridad,
Perdiendo el sentido de la realidad.
Ritmo que envuelve, ritmo que atrapa,
En este laberinto không hay escapatoria.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Bass intensifies, more grit)
Mira cómo el tiempo se detiene.

[Chorus]
Club nocturno, fuego y pasión,

Sin prisa.

title: Smooth Groove

lyrics:

Golden sunlight filtering through the leaves,

This is the place where we all belong.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Bassline becomes more syncopated)

See the fire in our eyes.

[Chorus]

Afro-fusion, energy and light,

[Bridge]

(Rhythmic clapping)

Heart’s desire.

Afro heart.

(Heavy dembow kick starts immediately)

(Bass drops lower)

[Chorus]

Reggaeton fuerte, energía real,

Izquierda, derecha.
Sin prisa.

title: Vibe de Verano

lyrics:
[Intro]
(Fast-paced Latin percussion layer)

[Intro]

Buscando el rastro de tu camino.

(Bass drops to a sub-drone)

title: Ocean Escape

lyrics:
[Intro]

(Dreamy vocal chops melody)
(Plucked synth enters gently)

[Verse 1]
Golden hours and a turquoise sea,

Sunlight dancing on the water’s edge,

No more static, no more noise,
Just the weight of our shared joys.

[Pre-Chorus]
(Light tropical percussion joins in)
Breathe it in, let it all go.
Let the tide dictate the flow.

[Chorus]
Ocean Escape, where the blue meets the sky,
Watching the world as it passes us by.
Tropical House, a heartbeat of sand,
Walking together, hand in hand.
(Vocal chop solo with breezy rhythm)
(Warm pads building resonance)

Finally free.

[Bridge]
(Drum beat stops, ambient pads only)

Secrets that only the ocean can keep.
(Soft snap track starts)
One more time...

[Outro]
(Plucked synth melody repeating and fading)
(Ocean waves return to full volume)
Azure dreams.
Stay with me.

title: Bhangra Beats

lyrics:
[Intro]

Dhol ki thap pe dil dharakne laga,

Bhangra Beats, jashn ki raat hai,

Dil se dil ka rasta...
Pyar ka ye wasta.
(Drum explosion returns)

Zindabad!

[Intro]

Baile do Morro, a festa começou,

Funk brasileiro, ritmo de elite,
Se joga no grave, entra no convite.

Pra frente, pra trás.
No pique, cada vez mais.
(Full beat explodes back with maximum energy)

[Outro]
(Bass and tambourine fading out sharply)

title: Vibe Latina

lyrics:

Bajo el neón, la noche se enciende,

Vibe Latina, fuego en la voz,

Un suspiro...
Một ước mơ.

[Outro]

Para siempre.

title: Sombras de la Noche

lyrics:
[Intro]

(Slow, heavy 808 bass hum)
(Vocal whisper: "Sombras...")

Luces que mueren en la esquina oscura,

[Chorus]
Sombras de la noche, envolviendo el ser,

Reggaeton oscuro, alma de metal,

title: Merengue de Oro

lyrics:
[Intro]
(Fast, bright brass section hit)
(Uptempo piano montuno starts)
(Vocal ad-lib: "¡Qué rico!")

¡Báilalo!

[Verse 1]
El guiro suena, el tambor retumba,
Llevando a todos directo a la rumba.
Con la alegría que el Caribe da,
Contigo mami, yo quiero bailar.

Cada vuelta es una bendición,
Llenando el aire de pura pasión.

(Fast percussion breakdown)

[Chorus]
Merengue de Oro, brillo tropical,

Fiesta divina, jashn real,

title: Oriental Trap

lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
Sokakların sesi, gecenin yankısı,

Oriental Trap, Doğu’nun ateşi,

Karanlık gölgeler, yüksek enerji,
Bu melodide saklı hayatın gerçeği.

title: Starlight Groove

lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
Nun-i busin i sigan, sijag-doeneun magic,

Banjjag-ineun byeol-bich-eul ttalaseo ga,
Kkumsog-eseodo ulin kkeut-eobs-i chug-jeleul hae.
Simjang-i ttwineun i lideum-eul neukkyeobwa,
Modeun ge saelowojeo, jigeum i sungan-e.
Sinteseijaieo-ga uli-leul gamssago,
Uju kkeut-kkaji ppeojyeonaganeun melodi.

[Pre-Chorus]
